# Nurullah Gungor (Official Correspondences)

<!-- vimeo: 1111791691 | track: English (auto-generated) -->

Hi, I am Dr. Inger. I work as a lecturer at Anchor Metropolitan University, the School of Justice in the card Office services program. Today, I will explain how I teach my students to write better petitions using chat GPT, these petitions aremore, correct, clear, short, and follow the official rules. This method can be used not only in my department, but also in any job where official writing is important. Official correspondence is very important for public institutions. A petition is not only airquest, it also shows the writer's, for instance, knowledge and skill. However, I see that many students have problems when writing petitions sentence are too long. The meaning is not clear. The format does not follow the rules. Here, check GPT can be a strong, but just using check GPT is not enough. Students must give good prompts and follow clear guidance. In my case, what I changed in my lessons one prompt training, I teach my students. If you know what you want, you get the best text. For example, instead of saying Write me a petition, they should say, write a petition in compliance with the official correspondence regulation to the Ankara. Third civil court of first instance, requesting an earlier hearing date for a land registry cancellation and registration case. Clear prompts improve the result by about 80%. Two. Custom GPTI added the rules of the official correspondence, regulation, petition templates and sample sentences into chat GPT. These make sure the answers follow the law and the correct format. Three, revision and comparison. So students first write their own draft. Then they ask chat. GPT, edit this petition according to the official correspondence regulation. Good. Make the language simple. Keep the legal meaning and give suggestions. By comparing the two versions, they can see their mistakes clearly. I studied the full official correspondence regulation and added it to my course notes. I focused on the rules where our students usually make mistakes. Later, I try to give prompt example to my students. I gave students a list of more than 10 prompt examples. For example, revise the petition I will provide according to the official correspondence regulation. Simplify the language, shorten sentence, but keep the legal meaning. Show missing parts and give suggestions. Question another example. Prepare a short and clear petition to the HAI district governorship requesting the opening of a library in our neighborhood. Write, introduction, development, and conclusion separately. On the other hand, practice is very, very, very important. Every week, Suan Prepare a petition. With chat GPT, we discuss both the Suan and GPTs versions in class. This makes learning interactive format and language mistakes dropped by 60%. Writing time went down from 40 minutes to 15 minutes, so students no write shorter and clear sentences. Their confidence improved. One student taught me teachers. I am no longer fi afraid to write petitions. GPT guides me, but I make the final change. It is very important. Message When used well chat, GPT is not a competitor, but a partner in education. I tell my students, technology will not think for you, but itll make thinking easier in my course. This approach improve both knowledge of the rules and professional Writing skills. AI assisted learning makes education faster and the knowledge more permanent. I am happy to share this with you. I hope you try similar methods and see the same result. Thank you.
